message:
fix(http/h1): use push counter for periodic task cleanup, remove unnecessary Box::pin in server read path

Two small h1 improvements:

1. **Listener push counter (listener.rs)**: ConnectionTasks now
   tracks a push_count incrementing on each push().  The periodic
   retain-only-unfinished-handles check triggers every 64 pushes
   using the counter instead of checking handles.len(), which
   avoids the edge case where retained-away handles would reset the
   modulo cycle.

2. **Server read future (server.rs)**: Removes an unnecessary
   Box::pin wrapping around the read_future async block — the
   future is already used in a position where the compiler can
   infer its size, so the heap allocation was needless overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
